title: stelis cryophila
intro: Stelis cryophila, also known as Ice Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis cryophila include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extract has also been used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
